Priya Mehta
Investment Banking Analyst, New York, NY
priya.mehta@example.com | 555-201-3001 | linkedin.com/in/priya-mehta-ib

SUMMARY
Investment banking analyst with 3 years in the Mergers & Acquisitions group of a
bulge-bracket bank, executing buy-side and sell-side deals across consumer and
industrials. Strong financial modeling and valuation skills; built DCF, LBO, and
accretion/dilution models and authored pitch books for managing directors.

EXPERIENCE
Investment Banking Analyst — Global Markets Bank (2022–present)
- Built and maintained discounted cash flow (DCF), leveraged buyout (LBO), and
  comparable companies / precedent transactions analyses for live M&A mandates.
- Drafted pitch books, confidential information memoranda, and management
  presentations for deals ranging from $200M to $2.4B in enterprise value.
- Ran diligence workstreams across capital markets, debt financing, and equity
  research coverage; coordinated with legal counsel on purchase agreements.

Summer Analyst — Boutique Advisory Partners (2021)
- Supported sell-side M&A processes; maintained the deal pipeline and built
  three-statement operating models and valuation outputs.

SKILLS
Investment banking, mergers and acquisitions (M&A), valuation, DCF, LBO,
financial modeling, pitch books, capital markets, leveraged finance, comparable
companies, precedent transactions, accretion/dilution, due diligence, Excel,
Capital IQ, FactSet, Bloomberg

EDUCATION
B.S. Finance, Stern School of Business, New York University, 2021
